title: Swim In Rising Water
hints: Notice that if you can reach the destination at time T, you can also do so at any time T' > T. This monotonicity suggests a search strategy.
Binary search on the answer T. For a fixed T, treat cells with elevation <= T as open and use BFS or DFS to check if a path exists.
Alternatively, use a modified Dijkstra algorithm where the cost to enter a cell is its elevation. The path cost is the maximum elevation encountered along the way.
